title: Introduce tester and builder implementation roles
summary: Add optional tester/builder workflow support so agent-created tests can be designed from roadmap work items before code implementation.

goal.outcome: Implementation compiler can optionally split agent-created tests into tester and builder roles.
acceptance: Task workflow documentation and tool briefs can request a tester role before builder work.
Tester receives roadmap work item and writes/updates tests without implementation changes when practical.
Builder receives roadmap work item plus tests and makes checks pass.
Validation can distinguish test-design evidence from build evidence.
non_goals: Always require separate agents for every task.
verification: targeted tests or smoke coverage for generated briefs/workflow metadata
manual dry-run on one roadmap work item
